'''zhalata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pycnosome|pycnosome]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-l-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pycnosome|pycnosome]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhalata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || zhælætæth || zhælætæj || zhælætæsh || zhælætæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || zhalalatath || zhalalataj || zhalalatash || zhalalata
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || zhalatath || zhalataj || zhalatash || zhalata
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || zhalaftafth || zhalaftafj || zhalaftafsh || zhalaftaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || zhalatatha || zhalataja || zhalatasha || zhalataka
|-
| [[Patient]] || zhalatath || zhalataj || zhalatash || zhalata
|-
| [[Possessive]] || zhalatathal || zhalatajal || zhalatashal || zhalatakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || zhalataathatha || zhalataajaja || zhalataashasha || zhalataaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || zhalatathan || zhalatajan || zhalatashan || zhalatakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || zhalatathaoro || zhalatajaoro || zhalatashaoro || zhalatakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
